mapper.sql: CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(i.image), '') IS NOT NULL AND LOCATE('/terrapedia-images/', TRIM(i.image)) > 0 THEN TRIM(i.image) ELSE COALESCE( ( SELECT ii.cached_url FROM item_images ii WHERE ii.item_id = i.id AND ii.deleted = 0 AND ii.status = 1 AND ii.cached_url IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ii.cached_url) != '' ORDER BY CASE WHEN LOCATE('/terrapedia-images/', ii.cached_url) > 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN ii.is_primary = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, ii.sort_order ASC, ii.id ASC LIMIT 1 ), NULLIF(TRIM(i.image), '') ) END
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT i.id, i.name, i.name_zh AS nameZh, i.internal_name AS internalName, AS image, i.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT icr.category_id ORDER BY icr.is_primary DESC, icr.sort_order ASC, icr.category_id ASC SEPARATOR ',') FROM item_category_rel icr WHERE icr.item_id = i.id AND icr.deleted = 0 AND icr.status = 1 ) AS relatedCategoryIdsRaw, i.description, i.description_zh AS descriptionZh, i.damage, i.defense, i.knockback AS knockback, i.use_time AS useTime, i.width AS width, i.height AS height, i.buy AS buy, i.sell AS sell, i.tooltip AS tooltip, i.tooltip_zh AS tooltipZh, i.rarity_id AS rarityId, COALESCE(ir.display_name_zh, ir.display_name_en) AS rarity, i.game_period_id AS gamePeriodId, COALESCE(gp.display_name_zh, gp.display_name_en) AS gamePeriod, i.game_model_id AS gameModelId, i.is_stackable AS isStackable, i.stack_size AS stackSize, i.status, i.created_at AS createdAt, i.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM items i LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = i.category_id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN item_rarity ir ON ir.id = i.rarity_id AND ir.deleted = 0 AND ir.status = 1 LEFT JOIN game_period gp ON gp.id = i.game_period_id AND gp.deleted = 0 AND gp.status = 1 WHERE i.id = #{id} AND i.deleted = 0

SELECT i.id, i.name, i.name_zh AS nameZh, i.internal_name AS internalName, AS image, i.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT icr.category_id ORDER BY icr.is_primary DESC, icr.sort_order ASC, icr.category_id ASC SEPARATOR ',') FROM item_category_rel icr WHERE icr.item_id = i.id AND icr.deleted = 0 AND icr.status = 1 ) AS relatedCategoryIdsRaw, i.rarity_id AS rarityId, COALESCE(ir.display_name_zh, ir.display_name_en) AS rarity FROM items i LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = i.category_id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN item_rarity ir ON ir.id = i.rarity_id AND ir.deleted = 0 AND ir.status = 1 WHERE i.deleted = 0 AND ( i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.name_zh LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(i.name_zh, ''), ' ', ''), ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), ' ', ''), '%') OR i.internal_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN i.name_zh = #{keyword} THEN 0 WHEN i.name = #{keyword} THEN 0 WHEN i.internal_name = #{keyword} THEN 1 WHEN REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(i.name_zh, ''), ' ', ''), ' ', '') = REPLACE(REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), ' ', '') THEN 1 WHEN i.name_zh LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 2 WHEN REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(i.name_zh, ''), ' ', ''), ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), ' ', ''), '%') THEN 3 WHEN i.name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 4 WHEN i.internal_name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 5 ELSE 6 END ASC, CHAR_LENGTH(COALESCE(i.name_zh, i.name)) ASC, i.id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
